gdprContent:
We respect your privacy and we are committed to protecting your personal data.Here is what you need to know:

• We do not sell your personal data to third parties
• We only store what you read and your user settings
• Your data is used only to provide and improve our language learning service
• You can delete all your data at any time by going to Settings and clicking on 'Delete the account'
• We comply with GDPR regulations and your rights concerning your personal data

By continuing to use our service, you consent to our data collection and processing practices described above.
